## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Tests pass (`npx jest --ci`)
- [ ] No sensitive data in logs or localStorage
- [ ] Feature spec updated if applicable (user-stories.md acceptance criteria)

## Closing Tasks (if completing an EUDI feature)

- [ ] C1: CHANGELOG.md entries added
- [ ] C2: Acceptance criteria marked `[x]` in user-stories.md
- [ ] C3: PRD status updated to **Implemented**
- [ ] C4: TASKS.md tasks marked as `completed`
- [ ] C5: Version bump (ask architect)
